mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId , SITE_ID AS siteId , LOGIN_ID AS loginId , PASSWORD AS password , MEMBER_NAME AS memberName , AUTH_LEVEL AS authLevel , EMAIL AS email , USE_YN AS useYn , REG_DT AS regDt , MOD_DT AS modDt , REG_USER AS regUser , DEPT_ID AS deptId FROM MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO MEMBER m USING (SELECT #{memberId} AS memberId FROM DUAL) t ON (m.MEMBER_ID = t.memberId) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET REFRESH_TOKEN = #{refreshToken}, MOD_DT = SYSDATE
